OUR STORY
Sambong Naengmyun is a modern Korean restaurant located in Duluth and Suwanee, specializing in authentic cold noodle dishes crafted with house-made broth and fresh, chewy noodles. Since opening in 2020, Sambong has become a beloved destination for those seeking a refreshing and flavorful take on Korea’s iconic summer dish — naengmyun.
Learn more
OUR MENU
Sambong foods
At Sambong Naengmyun, we believe every great Korean meal begins with fresh, high-quality ingredients made with love. Located in Duluth and Suwanee, Georgia, our restaurant proudly serves authentic Korean cold noodles (naengmyun) crafted daily—from house-made kimchi to fresh broth and hand-prepared noodles—ensuring the best taste and quality in every bowl.
View menu

Duluth Menu
Suwanee Menu
Due to the increase in the price of Korean red pepper powder, the prices of Bibim Naengmyeon, Raw fish Naengmyeon, and Kodari Naengmyeon (including combo meals) have been raised. Currently, Bindaetteok, Bibimbap, Dolsot Bibimbap, Ugeoji Galbitang, and Deulkkae Ugeoji Tang are only available at the Suwanee location of Sambong.
Due to the increase in the price of Korean red pepper powder, the prices of Bibim Naengmyeon, Raw fish Naengmyeon, and Kodari Naengmyeon (including combo meals) have been raised. Currently, Bindaetteok, Bibimbap, Dolsot Bibimbap, Ugeoji Galbitang, and Deulkkae Ugeoji Tang are only available at the Suwanee location of Sambong.
SIGNATURE COLD NOODLE
Original Cold Noodle
(물 냉면)
Potato starch noodle is served in chilled beef broth with radish, cucumber, boiled egg, sliced beef brisket, and pear
Spicy Cold Noodle
(비빔 냉면)
Potato starch noodle is served with spicy sauce with radish, cucumber, boiled egg, sliced beef brisket, and pear
Spicy Cold Noodle with Raw Fish (회 냉면*)
Potato starch noodle is served with spicy sauce with marinated skate fish, radish, cucumber, boiled egg, sliced beef brisket, and pear
Spicy Cold Noodle with Raw Pollock (코다리 냉면*)
Potato starch noodle is served with spicy sauce with marinated pollack fish, radish, cucumber, boiled egg, sliced beef brisket, and pear
SOUP & STEW
Ox-Bone Soup
(설렁탕)
A classic Korean comfort soup made from slow-simmered ox bones, served with tender sliced brisket in a milky, nourishing broth.
Short Rib Soup with Napa Cabbage Greens
(우거지 갈비탕)
A deep-flavored beef broth simmered with tender short ribs and seasoned napa cabbage leaves (우거지).
Ox-bone Soup with Tendons (도가니탕)
Silky and collagen-rich, this ox-bone soup is loaded with soft, chewy beef tendons, offering a smooth texture and deep umami taste
Ox-bone Soup with Vegetable Dumplings (만두설렁탕)
A comforting bowl of ox-bone broth paired with savory handmade vegetable dumplings—light, warm, and wholesome
Short Rib Soup with Radish
(갈비탕 )
A savory clear broth soup featuring meaty short ribs, daikon radish, and delicate seasonings for a deep, beefy flavor
Spicy Beef Tripe Stew with Vegetables
(소고기 국밥)
Hearty and bold, this traditional stew combines tender beef tripe, vegetables, and a spicy broth for a rich and satisfying meal
Perilla Seed & Napa Cabbage Soup (들깨 우거지탕)
A comforting and nutty soup made with simmered napa cabbage leaves (우거지) and rich perilla seed powder in a savory broth
COMING SOON (육개장)
A bold and spicy soup made with shredded beef, scallions, bracken, and vegetables simmered in a rich, red chili-infused broth

About – Sambong Naengmyeon – Authentic Korean Cold Noodles in Suwanee & Duluth, GA
Skip to main content
Hit enter to search or ESC to close

ABOUT SAMBONG
Sambong Naengmyun
is a premier
Korean restaurant in Duluth and Suwanee
, Georgia, specializing in
authentic Korean cold noodles
(naengmyun), house-made kimchi, and fresh, traditional Korean dishes. Our mission is simple: to bring the rich, refreshing flavors of Korea to the heart of Gwinnett County through quality ingredients, handcrafted meals, and heartfelt service.
Our Story
Sambong Naengmyun is a modern Korean restaurant located in Duluth and Suwanee, specializing in authentic cold noodle dishes crafted with house-made broth and fresh, chewy noodles. Since opening in 2020, Sambong has become a beloved destination for those seeking a refreshing and flavorful take on Korea’s iconic summer dish — naengmyun.
Where Tradition Meets Taste
At
Sambong Naengmyun
, we believe a truly great meal starts with love and fresh ingredients. That’s why we prepare everything
in-house daily
—from our deeply
flavorful broths
to our perfectly chewy
handmade noodles
, and our signature
house-fermented
kimchi
. No shortcuts. No compromises. Just pure, honest Korean flavor made fresh every day.
Why Locals Love Sambong
Authentic Korean Cold Noodles
(Naengmyun) – A refreshing, delicious specialty made with buckwheat noodles, chilled broth, and traditional toppings.
House-Made Kimchi
– Carefully fermented and seasoned with Korean spices for bold, balanced flavor.
Fresh Broth Cooked Daily
– Rich, savory, and crafted the traditional Korean way.
Family-Friendly Korean Restaurant
– Warm, welcoming environment perfect for both casual lunches and family dinners.
Top Korean Restaurant in Duluth & Suwanee
– Proudly serving the Georgia community with love and tradition.
